positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset, rendered in a distressed line art style, featuring overlapping triangles and clean, continuous lines. The central composition is a stylized mountain crest against a gradient sky of deep indigo and vibrant burnt orange. Use high contrast black lines on a clean background, suitable for t-shirts or apparel. Focus on clean negative space, elegant symmetry, and a sense of adventurous calm. Style of abstract graphic design, vector quality, clean ink drawing, highly detailed, professional print art.
